title: jit-agents does not read .pi/
context: .pi/ is Pi platform territory per the declared architecture. Current createAgentLoader's three-tier search reading from .pi/agents/ contradicts the declaration and was written before directory ownership was stated.
decision: jit-agents does not read from .pi/agents/, .pi/templates/, or .pi/monitors/. User overrides for agents are provided by the consumer package's territory (e.g. .project/agents/ for project-tier, ~/.pi/agent/agents/ for user-tier per the 3-tier discovery in DEC-0007).
consequences: createAgentLoader + createTemplateEnv have explicit negative tests pinning the no-.pi/ behavior
Specific discovery paths per consumer remain in scope of DEC-0007
